user.title: Tuya Peephole Camera
user.description: Enter your Tuya Smart / Smart Life app credentials.

device.title: Select Camera
device.description: Choose your peephole camera from the list of devices found in your account.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Update your Tuya credentials for the peephole camera.

abort.no_devices: No devices found in your Tuya account

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check email, password, and region.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Tuya API. Check network and try again.
error.no_devices: No devices found in your Tuya account.
error.device_not_found: Selected device not found. Try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.

data_description.retention_days: Recordings older than this will be automatically deleted (1-30 days)
data_description.recording_duration: Duration of each motion-triggered recording (10-300 seconds)
